choose.when:
WITH RECURSIVE family_ids AS ( SELECT id FROM family WHERE id = #{param.familyId} AND del_flag = 0 UNION ALL SELECT f.id FROM family f INNER JOIN family_ids fi ON f.pid = fi.id WHERE f.del_flag = 0 ) SELECT m.id, m.family_id, m.user_id, m.name, m.bind_code, m.relation, m.phone, m.role, m.avatar, m.create_time, f.name AS family_name, u.nickname AS user_nickname FROM family_member m LEFT JOIN family f ON f.id = m.family_id AND f.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = m.user_id AND u.del_flag = 0
AND m.family_id IN (SELECT id FROM family_ids)
AND (SELECT COALESCE(root_id, id) FROM family WHERE id = #{param.familyId} LIMIT 1) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) FROM family f2 WHERE f2.del_flag = 0 AND (f2.founder_id = #{param.currentUserId} OR f2.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0) OR COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_admin WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId})) )
AND (m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') OR u.mobile LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') OR m.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'))
AND m.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY m.id ASC
choose.otherwise:
SELECT m.id, m.family_id, m.user_id, m.name, m.bind_code, m.relation, m.phone, m.role, m.avatar, m.create_time, f.name AS family_name, u.nickname AS user_nickname FROM family_member m LEFT JOIN family f ON f.id = m.family_id AND f.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = m.user_id AND u.del_flag = 0
AND (SELECT COALESCE(f.root_id, f.id) FROM family f WHERE f.id = m.family_id AND f.del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) FROM family f2 WHERE f2.del_flag = 0 AND (f2.founder_id = #{param.currentUserId} OR f2.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0) OR COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_admin WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId})) )
AND (m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') OR u.mobile LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') OR m.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'))
AND m.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY m.id ASC

mapper.select: SELECT m.role FROM family_member m WHERE m.family_id = #{familyId} AND m.user_id = #{userId} AND m.del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
